title: Meeting Robert and Victoria
learningGoal: Listen to a basic English conversation and distinguish between R/L and V/B sounds in names.
instructions: 音声を聞いて、質問に答えてください。特に R と V の音（Robert, Victoria, Very）に注意して聞いてみましょう。(Listen to the audio and answer the questions. Pay special attention to the R and V sounds in Robert, Victoria, and Very.)
listeningGoal: To comprehend a basic introductory conversation and correctly identify spoken names containing R and V sounds.
audioScenario: Two people, Robert and Victoria, are meeting for the first time.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Hello. My name is Robert. Nice to meet you.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ヘロー。マイ ネーム イズ ロバート。ナイス トゥ ミート ユー。
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: こんにちは。私の名前はロバートです。はじめまして。

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: Nice to meet you too, Robert.
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ナイス トゥ ミート ユー トゥー、ロバート。
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: こちらこそはじめまして、ロバート。

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: I am Victoria. How are you?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: アイ アム ヴィクトリア。ハウ アー ユー？
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 私はヴィクトリアです。お元気ですか？

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: I am very well, thank you. And you?
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: アイ アム ヴェリー ウェル、サンキュー。アンド ユー？
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: とても元気です、ありがとう。あなたは？

audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: アイ アム ファイン、サンクス。

audioTranscriptFull:
Robert: Hello. My name is Robert. Nice to meet you.
Victoria: Nice to meet you too, Robert. I am Victoria. How are you?
Robert: I am very well, thank you. And you?
Victoria: I am fine, thanks.

questionSet.questionText: 男性の名前は何ですか？ (What is the man's name?)
女性の名前は何ですか？ (What is the woman's name?)
女性が「How are you?」と聞いた後、男性は何と答えましたか？ (How did the man reply when the woman asked 'How are you?')
options: I am very well, thank you.

questionSet.questionText: 男性が「And you? (あなたは？)」と聞いた後、女性は何と答えましたか？ (How did the woman reply to 'And you?')

correctAnswers.q3: I am very well, thank you.

feedbackRules.onPass: Great listening! You successfully identified the correct names and responses.
feedbackRules.onFail: Listen again carefully. The first letter of the man's name has an 'R' sound, not an 'L' sound.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Try listening to the slow audio to catch the exact words they use.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Robert: Hello. My name is Robert. Nice to meet you...

hintText: Pay attention to the 'V' sound in 'Very well' and 'Victoria'.
